name: Lead Time Scatterplot
query:
SELECT
    v_facts.event_end_at,
    v_facts.value AS lead_time_days,
    v_facts.entity_id AS issue_key,
    COALESCE(v_facts.slice_value, 'Unspecified') AS issue_type
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'lead_time_days'
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{completion_date}}]]
ORDER BY v_facts.event_end_at ASC
